name: Not What You Wished For
description:
When you find a magic lamp, a genie is supposed to come out of it and grant you three wishes.

But when you find a lamp that's empty, it takes you inside of it, and makes you its new wish master.

Just like the blurb says, you find an empty lamp, rub it, hoping for a genie, and instead end up as a sexy blue lady waiting for a lucky passerby to grant them whatever they desire.

This is the second bot of the "Dune June" series. Other bots of the series can be found here:

Harem Girls Have it Easy (Harem Girl TF)

Dummy Mummy GF (Mummy TF)

Riddle Me Tits (Sphinx TF)
creator: Frinky
